name: ARUN MALLIKARJUNA
headline: AI Platform & Full-Stack Engineer | LLM Integration · Agentic Apps · System Design

blocks.text: Full-stack engineer with 4+ years building and shipping production systems end to end — frontend, backend, and infrastructure — and 2+ years integrating LLM APIs (Gemini, Claude) and building core product features around them. Hands-on building agentic apps — custom AI agents with tool-calling, multi-step orchestration, subagents, system-prompt design, RAG pipelines, and evals — backed by strong system-design judgment and a product-driven mindset that ties code to the real customer problem. Comfortable owning the full lifecycle solo or in a small team — debugging and fixing failing code, reviewing implementations against the PRD, and running thorough QA (SIT, smoke, UAT, VAPT) before release.

blocks.heading: Senior Software Engineer — Tecnotree Convergence
bullets: Owned architecture and technical decisions for a rule-based Promotion Engine — the team's go-to for design choices — letting business teams launch telecom campaigns without redeployment and removing engineering from the campaign-launch loop.
Took the lead when systems failed: independently debugged and fixed production bottlenecks across distributed microservices, sustaining 99.5% availability under high transaction volume.
Reviewed code and architecture against the PRD and ran thorough QA — SIT, smoke testing, UAT, and coordinated VAPT — to ship reliable releases.
Made pragmatic performance and scope trade-offs without over-engineering — improved frontend performance ~30% via optimized React rendering, and tuned rule evaluation to cut per-request latency.
Integrated third-party services and contributed to CI/CD and deployment workflows to ship reliably across the stack.
Built reporting dashboards and analytics that surfaced campaign performance, aligning engineering output to clear business outcomes.

blocks.heading: Software Engineer — Tecnotree Convergence
bullets: Built scalable REST APIs in Node.js for high-volume transaction processing, optimizing for low latency under concurrent load with async/await and event-driven patterns.
Contributed to the microservices architecture, improving end-to-end throughput and system performance.
Developed configurable campaign workflows so non-technical business teams could launch promotions independently — aligning the code to a real customer and business need.
Optimized promotion rule-evaluation logic to reduce per-request latency and improve processing efficiency.

blocks.heading: Tailorwright — Multi-Surface AI Agent Platform
blocks.subheading: Next.js · TypeScript · Node.js · NestJS · Claude API
bullets: Built a full-stack TypeScript system with four front-ends — a web app, a Claude Code skill, a custom subagent, and a CLI — from one shared agent core, spanning frontend, backend, and tooling.

Designed the agent architecture: authored the system prompts, wired multi-step tool-calling and a delegated subagent, and built a planner/executor loop that reads inputs, decides actions, and self-corrects on failure.
Enforced a strict no-fabrication guardrail and structured-output schemas so the agent's responses stay grounded and machine-validatable, with retries on schema mismatch.
Built a deterministic, evaluation-ready scoring core and ran evals to measure agent output quality across cases, iterating on prompts to raise pass rates.
Instrumented the agents for end-to-end debuggability and hardened the web app against SSRF and malicious input.

blocks.heading: Free Resume Pro — AI SaaS Platform
blocks.subheading: Next.js · React.js · Node.js · Gemini API · Vercel
bullets: Designed, built, and launched a full-stack AI SaaS product end to end as the sole developer — frontend, backend, and deployment — owning the entire lifecycle on a one-person team.

Integrated the Gemini API with structured prompt engineering and a retrieval-augmented (RAG) flow over embeddings and vector retrieval for ATS scoring, job-description matching, and AI résumé rewriting.

Architected a privacy-first system with zero user-data storage, shipped 12+ customizable templates with inline editing, and scaled it on Vercel — making pragmatic trade-offs to ship fast without over-engineering.

blocks.heading: Promotion Manager System — Internal Platform
bullets: Designed and built a scalable promotion-management system for telecom campaigns on a microservices backend.
Built a rule-based engine that evaluates eligibility and applies promotions in real time, enabling non-technical teams to configure campaigns without code deployments.
Optimized rule processing to improve throughput and reduce evaluation latency across high-volume traffic.

blocks.heading: AI & LLMs
blocks.text: LLM API integration (Gemini, Claude), AI Agents / Agentic Apps, Tool-Calling & Multi-Step Orchestration, Subagents, Prompt & System-Prompt Engineering, RAG pipelines, Embeddings & Vector Retrieval, Structured Outputs, Evals

blocks.heading: Backend
blocks.text: Node.js, NestJS, Express.js, GraphQL, Apollo, Django, Flask, REST API design, Async/Await · Promises · Event Loop

blocks.heading: Frontend

blocks.heading: Databases

blocks.heading: Architecture & Infra
blocks.text: Microservices, System Design, Design Patterns, Reliability & Scaling, Serverless, CI/CD, Vercel, Railway

blocks.heading: Bachelor of Engineering — Computer Science
